chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3829 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.15902/2021 2. For hearing of main case 20.03.2025 Mr. Imran Iqbal Khan advocate for the petitioner Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondent Mr. Azad Hussain advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Naveed Ellahi, Collector of Customs, West. Per learned counsel for the petitioner grievance has been redressed, therefore, petition may be disposed of. Order accordingly. The presence and assistance of Collector of Customs West is noted and appreciated. Judge Judge Amjad
